a white letter in a blue circle

logo.inside_shape: Z is inside a navy blue circle, C is inside a light teal circle

step_2_brand_detection_pass1.overall_description: The image shows the ZONNIC logo centered left on a white background. The logo text is navy blue, with the C encircled by a solid light teal halo. No regulatory or additional text is present.

step_2b_formatted_detection_sent_to_pass:
OVERVIEW: The image shows the ZONNIC logo centered left on a white background. The logo text is navy blue, with the C encircled by a solid light teal halo. No regulatory or additional text is present.
CONTENT TYPE: logo_only

── LOGO ──
  Present: YES
  Position: center left
  Text colour: navy blue
  Distorted or modified: NO
  Clear space sufficient: YES
  Relative size: medium, occupies about 25% of image width

── C HALO (CRITICAL) ──
  Any halo present: YES
  Halo on Z (leftmost letter): NO (correct)
  Halo on C (rightmost letter): YES (correct)
  Halo on other letters: none
  Halo colour: solid light teal (matches Grey/Neutral secondary_light #89d0c8)
  Halo is gradient (two colours): NO — solid single colour ⚠
  Gradient colours: solid light teal
  Shape: circle
  Proportional: YES
  Has outline: NO

── BACKGROUND ──
  Type: white
  Colours: white
  Gradient direction: not present
  Description: solid white background

── REGULATORY ELEMENTS ──
  Nicotine warning: NOT PRESENT ⚠
  18+ age icon: NOT PRESENT ⚠
  Risk communication: NOT PRESENT ⚠

── TYPOGRAPHY ──
  Fonts: bold sans-serif
  Sans-serif: YES
  Additional text: NOT PRESENT

── COLOURS ──
  Dominant: navy blue, light teal, white
  Flavour palette match: Grey/Neutral
  Secondary colour usage: used as accent (halo around C)

step_3_rule_evaluation_pass2.summary: The ZONNIC logo is correctly displayed with the halo on the C and proper brand colours, but the image is missing all required regulatory elements: the bilingual nicotine warning, 18+ icon, and risk communication text. Additionally, the C halo is a solid colour instead of the required gradient for a white background. These are critical violations that must be addressed for compliance.

checks_performed.detail: No nicotine warning statement is present at the top of the image. Both English and French warnings are missing.
The 18+ age restriction icon is not present anywhere in the image.
Risk communication text is not present at the bottom of the image.
The ZONNIC logo is clearly visible and correctly positioned.
Logo text is navy blue on a white background, which is correct.
The C has a circular halo, sized proportionally, in the correct light teal colour for Grey/Neutral palette.
Logo is unmodified, no gradients in text, no outlines, no distortion, no stacking.
Background is solid white, not a gradient or image.
No gradient background is present, so gradient rules do not apply.
Logo-only content on a white background is acceptable for brand assets.
Only approved brand colours (navy blue, light teal, white) are used.
Logo uses bold sans-serif font, consistent with Santral. No additional text or NRT lockup present.
No grey gradient background is used, so these rules do not apply.
Logo has sufficient clear space around it, no elements intrude.
Halo does not blend into background, no flavour mismatch, logo not placed in shapes.

violations.rule_text: Every marketing asset MUST include a bilingual nicotine warning statement banner at the TOP of the creative.
violations.issue: No nicotine warning statement is present at the top of the image.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add a bilingual nicotine warning banner at the top of the image, including both English and French statements.
violations.evidence: No warning text found at the top.

violations.rule_text: The 18+ icon must be present on marketing materials to indicate age restriction.
violations.issue: The 18+ age restriction icon is missing.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the 18+ icon at the bottom of the image.

violations.rule_text: Every marketing asset MUST include risk communication text at the BOTTOM of the creative.
violations.issue: Risk communication text is missing at the bottom.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the required risk communication text at the bottom of the image.

violations.rule_text: The nicotine warning banner must be positioned at the TOP of the asset. The risk communication and 18+ icon must be at the BOTTOM. This placement is consistent across all compliant examples in the guidelines.
violations.issue: Required regulatory elements are missing from their designated positions.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the nicotine warning at the top, and the risk communication and 18+ icon at the bottom.
violations.evidence: No regulatory elements found at top or bottom.

violations.rule_text: The nicotine warning must appear in BOTH English and French on every asset. English uses 'WARNING:', French uses 'AVERTISSEMENT :'.
violations.issue: No bilingual nicotine warning is present.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add both English and French nicotine warnings at the top of the image.

violations.rule_text: On a white or grey gradient background, the C halo must always use the full gradient, consisting of both the primary and secondary colours.
violations.issue: The C halo is a solid light teal colour, not a gradient as required for a white background.
violations.fix_suggestion: Update the C halo to use the full gradient (primary dark + secondary light) for the Grey/Neutral palette.
violations.evidence: Halo is solid light teal, not a gradient.
